// purpose: Deno configuration for the story-execution sandbox (ADR-153 Phase 4).
// runtime: The Node server compiles each story to a self-contained ESM at install time (src/sandbox/story-bundler.ts), caches it at $STORIES_COMPILED_DIR/<slug>.host.js, and spawns Deno against that file.
// spawn-line: deno run --allow-read=<bundle>,<story> --v8-flags=--max-old-space-size=256 <bundle>  — see spawnSandbox() in src/sandbox/sandbox-process.ts
// permissions: Narrow --allow-read permits reading the compiled bundle and source .sharpee only. No env, net, write, subprocess, run, or ffi. Container is the outer boundary; these flags are the inner boundary against rogue story code.
// imports-map: Deliberately absent. Every @sharpee/* specifier is inlined by esbuild into the compiled bundle — there is nothing for Deno to resolve at runtime.
